title: 9 Claude Code Plugins to Build 10x Faster
summary: Austin Marchese demonstrates 9 Claude Code plugins designed to accelerate development, including tools for web scraping, model switching, token cost tracking, and AI output quality filtering. The plugins span integrations from Anthropic, Exa, Firecrawl, Higgsfield, and others to extend Claude's capabilities for faster coding workflows.
